narrative:
Perrysburg Ex Vill Sd (Wood) exempted village school district has 24,373 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.7 percentage points.
